steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Python 3.11+ pyproject.toml, src/onboard/ 및 tests/ 디렉토리 skeleton + __init__.py, smoke test 통과

steps.name: shared-schemas-constants
steps.summary: src/onboard/shared/schemas.py (TypedDict I/O), src/onboard/shared/constants.py (D4D 문서 표 하드코딩, RAC_MATRIX MappingProxyType read-only), tests/test_constants.py + test_schemas.py 총 45개 통과

steps.name: layer-02-mock-sensor
steps.summary: src/onboard/layer_02_sensor/schema.py (RawSensorEnvelope TypedDict, 8 카테고리 + lidar), mock_source.py (결정론적 build_normal/scenario_envelope), examples/raw_{t3,t4,t7}.json + mission_brief_{t3,t4,t7}.json 골든, tests/layer_02_sensor 18개 통과 (t3 gunshot/proximity, t4 3조건, t7 TTC<3.0)

steps.name: layer-03-deterministic-channels
steps.summary: src/onboard/layer_03_abstraction/ 결정론 채널 9개(position_consistency, link_status, rf_spectrum, link_integrity, encryption_status, mission_phase, obstacle_proximity, operational_margin, acoustic_event 1차) + run.py 오케스트레이터 + _common 유틸. AI 3채널(proximity_object/terrain_class/acoustic 2차)은 step4. tests/layer_03_abstraction 10개 통과 (정상=9채널 normal, t3 gunshot, t4 link+mission_phase mismatch, t7 TTC<3.0, quality_delta)

steps.name: layer-03-ai-stub-channels
steps.summary: src/onboard/ai_stubs/ (yolo_stub/segmentation_stub/yamnet_stub, ML lib import 없음), 새 채널 proximity_object·terrain_class, acoustic_event YAMNet 2차 게이팅 확장. run.py 11채널로 확장 (step4 순서 계약). tests/layer_03_abstraction 18개 통과 (t3 weapon anomaly, t4 person+closing, t7 terrain, terrain 항상 normal, YAMNet 게이팅, 11채널 순서)

steps.name: layer-04-threat-modeling
steps.summary: src/onboard/layer_04_threat/ 5개 모듈(run, step_a_phase, step_b_mapping, step_c_confidence, step_d_outcome) — 하드코딩 룰 테이블(eval 금지), 결정론+AI 로그오즈 교차검증, 국면배수 cap 0.95. tests/layer_04_threat/ 25개 테스트(골든: t3 T3/0.917, t4 T4/0.758, t7 T7/0.820) 전체 통과, 총 71개 통과

steps.name: layer-05-risk-assessment
steps.summary: src/onboard/layer_05_risk/ 5개 모듈(run, likelihood, severity, rac_matrix, compound) — RAC_MATRIX read-only 조회(오버라이드 불가), 결정론 RAC 지배 + continuous_L/S·ai_reliability 병렬 참고, urgency 정렬·priority_rank, 빈 후보 시 ambient_rac degrade. orchestrator 시그니처 run(threat, mission_brief, link_quality=None) 정합. tests/layer_05_risk/ 56개(D-1 손계산 골든 + matrix 불변성 + degradation) 통과, 전체 213 passed

steps.name: layer-06-response
steps.summary: src/onboard/layer_06_response/ — flight_comms(RAC×kill_chain_stage×threat_category 조회), payload_nav(DATA_WIPE/WEAPON_DROP/INS_ONLY 오버레이), run(1순위 실행+secondary_threats 요약). tests/layer_06_response/ 26 PASSED.

steps.name: layer-07-flight-planning
steps.summary: src/onboard/layer_07_planning/ — bearing(threat_category별 target bearing), altitude(flight_action별 delta_m 상수 테이블), run(replan_scope 매핑+bearing/altitude 조합→FlightPlanOutput). tests/layer_07_planning/ 20 PASSED.
